subcodes.first_line: O daughters of Samandari! The mention of each one hath been and ever shall be in the Most Holy Court, and at this hour from the heaven of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بنات سمندری ذکر هر یک در ساحت اقدس بوده و هست و در این حین از سماء عطا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
